label: Gravistimulation / rotation
plain_english_role: A change in shoot orientation relative to gravity.

label: Statocytes
plain_english_role: Gravity-sensing cells proposed to detect the stimulus.

label: Endodermis
plain_english_role: Shoot tissue layer often discussed as part of gravity sensing.

label: Amyloplast sedimentation
plain_english_role: Movement or settling of starch-filled plastids after reorientation.

label: LAZY/LZY module
plain_english_role: A signalling module proposed to link gravity perception to auxin transport polarity.

label: PIN-mediated auxin redistribution
plain_english_role: Redistribution of auxin mediated by PIN transporters.

label: Auxin asymmetry
plain_english_role: Unequal auxin distribution across the shoot.

label: Differential cell expansion
plain_english_role: Unequal expansion across sides of the shoot.

label: Curvature
plain_english_role: Physical bending of the shoot axis.

label: Family / genotype effects
plain_english_role: Inherited genetic background differences that may modify the response.

label: Gravitropic vs agravitropic families
plain_english_role: Comparative grouping of lineages or families by gravitropic behaviour.
